hero.headline: A friend of the founders has a <0>gift for you</0>
hero.whatIsBody: Launching with payments — so invoicing, late payments, taxes, and endless reminders are no longer your problem.
hero.whatIsFootnote: Built by ex-Google & Meta leaders with 80+ years in the creator economy.

signupCard.headline: First Year, Free
signupCard.exclusiveLine: Exclusively for {{friend}}'s referrals — not a public offer
signupCard.disclaimer: By tapping, you agree to create an account and Sparkonomy's <0>Terms</0> and <1>Privacy Policy</1>
